summary: In this refreshing conversation, Bhartendra Singh sits down with Swarup Mohanty (Vice Chairman & CEO, Mirae Asset Investment Managers) to break down how to REALLY choose mutual funds, why past returns mislead new investors, and how India’s massive growth story demands smart, goal-based investing.

How to Evaluate a New Fund House or a New Fund ?
Whats the Investment Strategy for Mirae Asset Managers ?

Should we invest all money in Equity ?

Final Wisdom & How to Stay Disciplined

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: This episode is really about your mix. Put in your numbers and see the equity, debt, gold and international split that actually fits you.

seo.title: The Truth About Making Money With Mutual Funds | Mutual Fund Nivesh से पैसे बनाने का सही तरीका|Ep12

takeaways: The size of a fund house is not the real question; what matters is whether the fund fits your goal, so watch your own bias before you judge an AMC by its size.
Past returns belong to past investors; the returns you actually see depend on your patience and how long you stay with your allocation.
India's growth story only works for you if you stay invested through it rather than jumping in and out.
Asset allocation, not stock picking, does most of the heavy lifting, and a good advisor's job is to help you hold that allocation when it gets uncomfortable.
AI can help you find and understand funds, but your own discipline matters more than any tool.
